label: Adobe Commerce SaaS (out-of-process)
_note: The out-of-process Commerce dev model — NO PHP backend. Composes App Builder (aio + API Mesh + I/O Events) and the EDS commerce storefront (hlxsites/aem-boilerplate-commerce + @dropins/storefront-*). Toolchain: Node + aio + git + aem-cli. One edition; the flow offers two create paths (storefront / extension). Reuses the existing aio session (never forces re-login).
